chunks.text: Development of in vitro bioelectronic implant aging (EECS-2024-28) by Jacob Sporrer. Development of a Magnesium Semi-solid Redox Flow Battery (EECS-2022-241) by Matthew McPhail. Design, Development and Applications of Portable Field Emission Devices (EECS-2021-224) by Nishita Deka, Vivek Subramanian and Kristofer Pister.

2-D Materials: Low Power Electronics and Novel Device Possibilities (EECS-2019-13) by Varun Mishra. Cell Geometry Impact on the Cell Filling Process in Gravure Printing for Printed Electronics (EECS-2018-165) by Xiaoer Hu. Three-Dimensional Structure Formation via Inkjet-printed Metal Nanoparticles: Ink and Application Development (EECS-2018-96) by Dwipayan Patnaik.

Gravure-printed Highly-scaled Organic Thin-film Transistors for Low-cost and Large-area Electronics (EECS-2014-194) by Hongki Kang and Vivek Subramanian. Novel Technologies for Next Generation Memory (EECS-2013-136) by WookHyun Kwon. Solution Processed Silver Sulfide Thin Films for Filament Memory Applications (EECS-2010-166) by Shong Yin.

DNA Detection Using Organic Thin Film Transistors: Physical Origins of Electrical Transduction Behavior and Optimization of Sensitivity (EECS-2009-11) by Lakshmi Jagannathan and Vivek Subramanian. Gravure as an Industrially Viable Process for Printed Electronics (EECS-2008-70) by Vivek Subramanian and Donovan Sung. Nanoscale organic electronics: Experimental and theoretical studies on alkyl thiophene and rotaxane (EECS-2008-66) by Kin-Yip Phoa and Vivek Subramanian.
Enabling Technologies for Organic Memories (EECS-2006-102) by Brian Alexander Mattis and Vivek Subramanian.
